summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. No mutating close/merge/fix actions are safe from the hydrated evidence.

actions.reason: Open feature PR with distinct scope; not a duplicate, superseded, low-signal, or security-routed item from the available evidence.
Focused standalone bug-fix PR with failing proof/check evidence; keep open rather than close or merge.
Draft active contributor PR with unique memory-wiki scope; not safe to close as duplicate/superseded/low-signal.
Standalone provider hardening/behavior PR with no checks reported; keep open for normal review rather than route as security or close.
Maintainer-owned broad docs/comment PR explicitly needs maintainer judgment; no safe close classification is supported by the artifact.

needs_human: #88793 needs maintainer judgment because it is a broad maintainer-labeled PR marked ready for maintainer look and has failing validation lanes.
